      public com.iwedia.dtv.A4TVStatus show()
      Show BML content if available. Use isBMLReady to get status for BML data availability.
      Returns:
      operation status

      public boolean isBmlReady()
      Get availability of BML data
      Returns:
      BML data availability status, true present, false not present

      Retreive mask for BML keys

      Returns:
      key event handled status (true handled, false not handled)
